creator: nickblack@linux.com
text:
Created attachment 218642
svn diff against 551913

Updates devel/notcurses from 1.7.0 to 1.7.6.

Tested with `port test devel/notcurses` and portlint.

The `notcurses-ncreel` program (and its attendant man page) are no longer installed, as they are no longer built. The new header Widget.hh is now installed.
